template: template.md

topics: AI Development patterns and best practices

template: Fetch the {{source}} URL and review the articles listed on the page.
Identify the top 5 articles that are relevant to the following topics: {{interests.topics}} and companies: {{interests.companies}}.
Only include articles from the last 7 days. Skip articles with older dates or no date information.
Be sure articles have not already been included in a previous file (yyyyMMdd_news_report.md).
Save the articles to {{work}} in the following JSON format: [articles: { source, title, url, summary, date }]

CRITICAL: If {{work}} already exists, you MUST read it first, parse the JSON array, append your new articles to that array, then write the merged array back. Use Python code like: existing = json.load(f) if file exists, then existing.extend(new_articles), then json.dump(existing). Do NOT overwrite the file.
Be concise in your approach - fetch the data, analyze it, and save the results without excessive intermediate steps.
Do not run any other commands, and do not review any other local files.
If you want to save a file locally, use the local './tmp' directory instead of '/tmp' directory, and delete the file when you're done.
Review the articles listed in the {{work}} file.
Rank the articles based on relevance to the following topics: {{interests.topics}} and companies: {{interests.companies}}.
Generate a markdown report using the {{template}} file, summarizing the top 25 articles.
Save the report to {{report}}.
Be efficient - read the file once, process in memory, and write the output.
Do not run any other commands, and do not review any other local files.
If you want to save a file locally, use the local './tmp' directory instead of '/tmp' directory, and delete the file when you're done.
For each 'top' article in the {{report}} file, fetch the full content from the article's URL.
Provide a more detailed summary of the article, including key points and insights, as it relates to the following topics: {{interests.topics}} and companies: {{interests.companies}}.
Update the article entry in the {{report}} file with the detailed summary.
Process efficiently - batch fetch if possible, and update the file once at the end.
Do not run any other commands, and do not review any other local files.
If you want to save a file locally, use the local './tmp' directory instead of '/tmp' directory, and delete the file when you're done.
